item.title: Poison Ivy - Cosplay
item.description:
Hey everybody... How we all doing? Here is some cosplay to cut through it all... I am not going to talk much about the elephant in the room, other than saying this: I for one, plan on doubling my existence. You are only going to see way more of me. Best support you can give is to do the same for yourself, or speak up to others about why folks like myself should be here. That is where I will leave it. Love y'all :)
Reference image from the Harley Quinn Animated Series
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: May I Offer You a Nudi in These Trying Times?
item.description: Possibly the most cartoon-like of all nudibranchs, the leaf sheep has bonus photosynthetic powers! By storing chloroplasts in their cells, they not only photosynthesize but also mimic the appearance of the algae, helping them avoid predators. Plus, it makes them look extra-adorable. The 'blush' just throws it over the top. sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C_gNzYbxOBX/
item.dc:creator: ChorizoPig

item.title: If you did absentee or mail-in ballot, for the love of God, CHECK TO MAKE SURE IT ACTUALLY GOT COUNTED
item.description:
https://www.vote.org/ballot-tracker-tools/ The race for President is over, but there's still local races, ballot measures, referendums, etc. that are up for grabs. These are sometimes decided by a HANDFUL of ballots. YES, EVEN IF YOU LIVE IN A BLUE STATE.
https://www.vox.com/2024-elections/382799/ballot-curing-mailed-absentee-ballots-fix-signature

item.title: You can do it. We can do it.
item.description: But if you did, or you do, I am a judgment free zone, only love and support. 4 years, 10 months, 6 days and counting.
item.dc:creator: ninjzaness

item.title: I Realized Something Big Today
item.description: I’m a girl from the US married to another girl from Chile. My wife is a scholar in archaeology. After she graduated from college in the US a couple of years ago, she couldn’t find any openings to be a professor in the states. Just…no one was hiring in her field. It happens. She got this incredible opportunity back home in Chile, and has been here teaching for the past year and a half. I moved from the US down here 4ish months ago. It hit me today, after going through all of the emotions yesterday, that I’ll probably never live in the states again. Our marriage will likely be dissolved in the US in a few months. We’re safe to be ourselves here, for now. But shit y’all, this is one of the strangest full-bodied feelings I’ve ever had. And it doesn’t feel good, believe me. Stay safe, friends.
item.dc:creator: hface18

item.title: Their blue collar is their trojan horse
item.dc:creator: BurnsMGur

item.title: A new US Citizen...for whatever that's worth now
item.description: My super sweet and gentle Cambodian mother-in-law became a US Citizen on November 6th, 2024, the day after the election. She survived Pol Pot's concentration camps and saw things you wouldn't believe. But she persevered and eventually raised a wonderful family with a son and 3 daughters, one of whom I married. We were pretty excited about her becoming a US Citizen, but now it seems like it was all for nothing. With Dictator Trump about to assume power, it feels like a hollow victory, an exercise in futility to be honest.
item.dc:creator: ChromePlatedEquator

item.dc:creator: kudzoo

item.title: Meet the Thanksgiving Kittens!
item.description:
I picked up four new foster kittens today and decided they needed Thanksgiving-food-themed names. This baby boy is the most playful so far, very comfortable in his new surroundings.
Turkey is one I’ve got to keep my eye on. He needed fluids today because he’s so skinny (you can’t tell because of all the fur), but he chowed DOWN on the dry food and drank a ton of water when I got him home so he may be ok.
Little Cassie here is the most scared. She’s spent most of the afternoon in the carrier, wasn’t super happy about coming out. And when she DID come out, she just slept in the litter box. She needs to feel contained to feel safe, so I’m gonna give her her space. She also has thrown up a couple of times so we’re going back to the humane society tomorrow for some meds.
Pumpkin Pie here is SO affectionate. She has been purring and snuggling in my lap all evening. Such a precious baby. I’m pretty much obsessed with all of these kittens already. Can’t wait to see all their personalities come out! Thank you for all the name suggestions!! I don’t have many people in my life to share my kittens with, so I very much appreciate all your input and love. You guys are the best!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

Do you go shulrp or mlem mlem mlem?

That all seems a lifetime ago and just yesterday at the same time

This needs to be added in a game

item.title: Hobbits in Ent lore
item.description:
This in an account on Entish folklore about living creatures, and the news that was Hobbits.
When Merry and Pippin met Treebeard they told him that they were hobbits and asked him who he was? The ancient Elder Ent replied (The Two Towers; III; IV onwards);
"`Not so hasty. And I am doing the asking. You are in my country. What are you, I wonder? I cannot place you. You do not seem to come in the old lists that I learned when I was young. But that was a long, long time ago, and they may have made new lists."
He tried to recall how it went and recited: "Learn now the lore of Living Creatures! First name the four, the free peoples: Eldest of all, the elf-children; Dwarf the delver, dark are his houses; Ent the earthborn, old as mountains; Man the mortal, master of horses:
Hm, hm, hm. Beaver the builder, buck the leaper, Bear bee-hunter, boar the fighter; Hound is hungry, hare is fearful…
hm, hm. Eagle in eyrie, ox in pasture, Hart horn-crowned; hawk is swiftest Swan the whitest, serpent coldest…
Hoom, hm; hoom, hm, how did it go? Room tum, room tum, roomty toom tum. It was a long list. But anyway you do not seem to fit in anywhere!' `We always seem to have got left out of the old lists, and the old stories,'; said Merry."
Pippin proposed to add a new line, "Half-grown hobbits, the hole-dwellers", next to Man (the Big People): "`Hm! Not bad, not bad,' said Treebeard. 'That would do. So you live in holes, eh? It sounds very right and proper."
But his approval did not suffice alone. The day after they met occured the Entmoot, where Treebeard presented his guests to his kin and after a long while he informed the hobbits;
"`I have told your names to the Entmoot, and they have seen you, and they have agreed that you are not Orcs, and that a new line shall be put in the old lists. We have got no further yet, but that is quick work for an Entmoot."
After the Ents captured Isengard it was visited by a company led by Gandalf the Wizard. Merry and Pippin left with the company, and Gandalf told Treebeard that he would manage without the halflings (TTT; III; X onwards);
"`Maybe I shall,' said Treebeard. 'But I shall miss them. We have become friends in so short a while that I think I must be getting hasty - growing backwards towards youth, perhaps. But there, they are the first new thing under Sun or Moon that I have seen for many a long, long day. I shall not forget them.
I have put their names into the Long List. Ents will remember it. Ents the earthborn, old as mountains, the wide-walkers, water drinking; and hungry as hunters, the Hobbit children, the laughing-folk, the little people, they shall remain friends as long as leaves are renewed. Fare you well!'"
Art credits: #1 Alvaro Ramirez #2 Poul Art #3 Fantasticabstract #4 Allen Morris #5 Barbara McGeachen #6 Mark Miller #7 CharlieBitsMe #8 Marilena Mexi #9 Alex Brock #10 Stephen Hickman #11 Anatoly Muschenko #13 Anna Kulisz #14 Ulla Thynell
For further Tolkien lore posts, here are my indexes: Character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF Folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Giving power to rapists
item.description: I’m so glad I’m not American; but I love one I am helping gtf away from there. I just can’t get past the level of power voters just handed to a rapist. Again. Look at the men in your life who voted for a known and PROUD rapist - you or other women you know are neither safe nor immune from the results of this acceptance and endorsement of sexual violence. Protect yourselves collectively however you can, because emboldening this kind of thing only ends one way.
item.dc:creator: irespectfullycourtyermam

item.title: Optical illusion
item.description: This optical illusion is known as an ambiguous object, an object that changes its appearance when reflected in a mirror. If you place the object on the table & position a mirror behind it, you can see both shapes at the same time!
item.dc:creator: SweepTheLeg31
